title: Man given whole-life order for murder of woman and children in Bradford fire
description: Sharaz Ali, 40, sentenced over arson attack in which his ex-partner’s sister and her three children died
content:
A man who killed his ex-partner’s sister and her three children by setting fire to their house has been sentenced to a whole-life order.

title: ‘I believe I can do it’: George Russell favourite for F1 title as new era begins
description: Rule changes will affect driver style and car performance with world champion Lando Norris already under scrutiny
content: With the long and increasingly febrile buildup almost at an end, Formula One is finally ready to go racing into the sport’s new era. Whether it will prove a success is one of many questions that will be answered at the season-opener in Melbourne this... [5237 chars]

title: Russian intelligence suspected after Birmingham targeted in 'self-igniting parcel' attacks
description: "Test packages" were also sent to the US and Canada, while two more packages bound for North America were intercepted in Amsterdam.
content:

title: Iranian schools, hospital and landmarks among civilian sites hit during US-Israeli strikes
description: A local in Tehran tell BBC Verify that the city has been turned into a "ghost town" as residents flee.
content:
Schools, a hospital and historic landmarks have been severely damaged since US and Israeli strikes on Iran began on Saturday, satellite images and verified videos show, as the number of reported civilian casualties grows.
